title: Exquisite Light Ethiopian Cheese Curds Skillet
description: A sweet and juicy Ethiopian dish featuring cheese curds, this skillet is perfect for a light and satisfying meal. It is nut-free and easy to make.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, until the spice is fragrant.
Add the diced tomato and cook until it is soft and the mixture is heated through.
Add the cheese curds and stir gently to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the broiler and cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skillet from the oven and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
